applicationWindow.notes: Second NR general-elk draw period for 2026 (first ran Dec 5–15, 2025). Tag claim deadline Mar 20. First year of NR general elk draw replacing the old OTC first-come system — 40,000+ apps in the first round.

secondaryDraw.notes: Controlled elk hunts run May 1 – Jun 5. Results early July.

nr.notes: NR hunting license $185 (non-refundable, must buy before applying). Elk tag $651.75 if drawn. Controlled-hunt app fee $18 (no app fee on the NR general draw for 2026 — may change in future years). Archery permit $81.75 if applicable.

pointSystem.notes: Pure random — Idaho has no preference or bonus point system. Equal odds every year.

otc.notes: OTC NR general-elk eliminated for 2026 — now draw. Returned/unclaimed tags may release on monthly dates throughout the year.

applicationWindow.notes: Second NR general-deer draw period. Tag claim deadline Mar 20. Controlled hunts run May 1 – Jun 5.

nr.notes: NR hunting license $185 + deer tag $351.75 if drawn. Controlled hunt app fee $18.

applicationWindow.notes: Big 3 (moose/sheep/goat) — must choose between Big 3 OR elk/deer/antelope for controlled hunts. Results late May.

nr.notes: Big-3 application fees higher than the standard $18; verify exact tag prices at idfg.idaho.gov.

applicationWindow.notes: Most bear is OTC. Spring controlled bear draw results ~Feb 27.

nr.notes: NR bear tag ~$186 (~$171 tag + ~$15 license portion) plus the $185 NR hunting license. Spring + fall seasons.

otc.notes: OTC bear tag for NR. Spring and fall seasons. Wolf is also OTC.
